---
title: '**ATDP Report**'
author: "`r paste0('Produced By: ',Sys.getenv('USERNAME'))`"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%a %b %d, %Y @ %X')`"
output:
  pdf_document: default
documentclass: article
abstract: "**Automatically generated report on user-selected variables from the Agricultural Taxation Data Program administered by Statistics Canada. Results are as-is and not subject to the original programmer's review.**"
fontsize: 11pt
header-includes: \usepackage[default]{droidsans} \usepackage{geometry} \geometry{top=1in,left=1in,bottom=1in,right=1in}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r load_packages, include=FALSE}

library(tidyverse)
library(devtools)
library(tinytex)
library(kableExtra)
library(lubridate)
library(stringr)
library(scales)

```


```{r import_data, include=FALSE}

#load("atdp_reporting/atdp_data.RData")
load("atdp_data.RData")

```

# Preamble

The user has selected the following variables for **`r selected_prov`**:

```{r report_vars, results='asis',echo=FALSE}

cat("\n")
cat(paste0("* ",selected_vars),
    sep = "\n")

```

The data run from **`r min(selected_atdp$REF_DATE)` to `r max(selected_atdp$REF_DATE)`**.

Reported values are at the **`r selected_type`** level.

The selected level of analytical complexity is: **`r selected_complexity`**

\newpage

```{r process_data, include=FALSE}

reports<-as.list(rep(0,length(selected_vars)))

if(selected_complexity=="Simple (Summary, Graphs)"){
  for(v in 1:length(reports)){reports[[v]]<-as.list(rep(0,2))}
}
if(selected_complexity=="Expanded (Simple + Linear Fit)"){
  for(v in 1:length(reports)){reports[[v]]<-as.list(rep(0,3))}
}
if(selected_complexity=="Complex (Expanded + Correlation)"){
  for(v in 1:length(reports)){reports[[v]]<-as.list(rep(0,3))}
}

names(reports)<-selected_vars

for(v in 1:length(selected_vars)){
  
  loop_data<-selected_atdp %>%
    mutate(Estimates=as.character(Estimates),
           REF_DATE=round(as.numeric(REF_DATE),0)) %>%
    filter(Estimates==selected_vars[v]) %>%
    mutate(Date=REF_DATE,
           Value=VALUE,
           Trend=REF_DATE-min(REF_DATE)+1)
  
  names(reports[[v]])[1]<-"summary"
  names(reports[[v]])[2]<-"graph"
  
  # Summary
  
  var_summary<-c(summary(loop_data$VALUE),sd(loop_data$VALUE))
  names(var_summary)[7]<-"SDev."
  var_summary_values<-as.numeric(round(var_summary,0))
  var_summary_values<-format(var_summary_values,
                             nsmall=0,
                             big.mark=",")
  var_summary_names<-names(var_summary)
  var_summary<-as.data.frame(
    cbind(var_summary_names,
          var_summary_values))
  names(var_summary)<-c("name","value")
  
  var_summary<-paste0("* ",
                      var_summary$name,
                      " - ",
                      var_summary$value)
  
  reports[[v]][[1]]<-var_summary
  
  rm(var_summary_values,
     var_summary_names,
     var_summary)
  
  # Graphs
  
  ymin<-min(0,as.numeric(min(loop_data$Value))*1.2)
  ymax<-max(as.numeric(loop_data$Value))*1.2
  
  var_graph<-suppressMessages(
    ggplot(data = loop_data,
           aes(Date,
               Value)) +
      geom_line() +
      geom_point() +
      ylim(ymin,
           ymax) +
      scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
      scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(
        accuracy = 1,
        big.mark = "")) +
      ggtitle(selected_vars[v])
  )
  
  reports[[v]][[2]]<-var_graph
  
  rm(ymin,
     ymax,
     var_graph)
  
  if((selected_complexity=="Expanded (Simple + Linear Fit)")|
     (selected_complexity=="Complex (Expanded + Correlation)")){
    
    names(reports[[v]])[3]<-"linear"
    
    # Linear fit
    
    var_linear<-lm(as.numeric(loop_data$Value)~loop_data$Trend)
    
    linear_summary<-summary(var_linear)
    
    var_linear_summary<-c(
      paste0("* Intercept: ",
             format(round(linear_summary$coefficients[1,1],0),
                    nsmall=0,
                    big.mark=","),
             " (t = ",round(linear_summary$coefficients[1,3],1),")"),
      paste0("* Trend: ",
             format(round(linear_summary$coefficients[2,1],0),
                    nsmall=0,
                    big.mark=","),
             " (t = ",round(linear_summary$coefficients[2,3],1),")"))
    
    reports[[v]][[3]]<-var_linear_summary
    
    rm(var_linear,
       linear_summary,
       var_linear_summary)
    
  }
  
}

rm(v)

if(selected_complexity=="Complex (Expanded + Correlation)"){
  
  # Correlation
  
  var_cor_frame<-selected_atdp %>%
    mutate(value=as.numeric(VALUE)) %>%
    select(value,
           REF_DATE,
           Estimates) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = "Estimates",
                values_from = "value") %>%
    select(-REF_DATE)
  
  var_cor_matrix<-data.matrix(var_cor_frame)
  
  var_p_matrix<-round(cor_pmat(var_cor_matrix),3)
  var_cor_matrix<-round(cor(var_cor_matrix),2)
  
  var_cor_plot<-suppressMessages(ggcorrplot(
    var_cor_matrix,
    p.mat = var_p_matrix,
    method = "circle",
    type = "lower", 
    lab = TRUE,
    title = "Correlation Matrix of Selected Data",
    ggtheme = theme_minimal))
  
  rm(var_cor_frame,
     var_cor_matrix,
     var_p_matrix)
  
}

```

```{r produce_report, results='asis',echo=FALSE}

for(v in 1:length(reports)){
  
  cat(paste0("# ","Report: ",names(reports)[v],"\n"))
  
  for(r in 1:length(reports[[v]])){
    
    if(r==1){
      cat(paste0("## ","Basic Summary","\n"))
      cat(reports[[v]][[1]],sep = "\n")
    }
    cat("\n")
    if(r==2){
      cat(paste0("## ","Graphic Summary","\n"))
      print(reports[[v]][[2]])
      cat("\n")
    }
    cat("\n")
    if(r==3){
      cat(paste0("## ","Linear Trend Model","\n"))
      cat(reports[[v]][[3]],sep = "\n")
    }
    cat("\n")
  }
  
  cat("\\newpage")
  
}

cat(paste0("# ","Report: All Vars. Correlation","\n"))
print(var_cor_plot)

```
